ddls:
CREATE TABLE "equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of equipment */,
  "product_id" TEXT /* Product ID of the equipment */,
  "equipment_type" TEXT /* Type of equipment (e.g., M, L) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the equipment */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the equipment was installed */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the equipment */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the equipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment the sensor is attached to */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., temperature, pressure) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was last calibrated */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reading */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that took the reading */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment the sensor is attached to */,
  "reading_value" REAL /* Value of the reading */,
  "reading_time" TEXT /* Time the reading was taken */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the reading (e.g., good, bad) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical event */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment the event occurred on */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Time the event occurred */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., maintenance, failure) */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "cause" TEXT /* Cause of the event */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_history_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment the maintenance was performed on */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the maintenance was performed */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine, emergency) */,
  "maintenance_description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance */,
  "technician" TEXT /* Technician who performed the maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, maintenance personnel) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment the alert is related to */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Time the alert was generated */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., warning, critical) */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the alert (e.g., low, high) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, cleared) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the notification was sent to */,
  "notification_time" TEXT /* Time the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "notification_description" TEXT /* Description of the notification */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, read) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment_target_values" (
  "target_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each target value */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment the target value is for */,
  "parameter" TEXT /* Parameter being targeted (e.g., temperature, pressure) */,
  "target_value" REAL /* Target value for the parameter */,
  "tolerance" REAL /* Tolerance for the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_target_values_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment_state" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment the state is for */,
  "state_time" TEXT /* Time the state was recorded */,
  "state_description" TEXT /* Description of the state */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the equipment (e.g., running, stopped) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_state_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment_type" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equipment type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the equipment type */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the equipment type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "failure_types" (
  "failure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each failure type */,
  "failure_name" TEXT /* Name of the failure type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the failure type */,
  "recommended_actions" TEXT /* Recommended actions for the failure type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("failure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "udis" (
  "udi_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each UDI value */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment the UDI value is for */,
  "udi_value" INTEGER /* UDI value */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the UDI value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("udi_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_udis_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "air_temperature" (
  "air_temperature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each air temperature value */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment the air temperature value is for */,
  "air_temperature" REAL /* Air temperature value */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the air temperature value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("air_temperature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_air_temperature_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "process_temperature" (
  "process_temperature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each process temperature value */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment the process temperature value is for */,
  "process_temperature" REAL /* Process temperature value */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the process temperature value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("process_temperature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_process_temperature_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rotational_speed" (
  "rotational_speed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rotational speed value */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment the rotational speed value is for */,
  "rotational_speed" INTEGER /* Rotational speed value */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the rotational speed value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rotational_speed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rotational_speed_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "torque" (
  "torque_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each torque value */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment the torque value is for */,
  "torque" REAL /* Torque value */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the torque value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("torque_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_torque_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tool_wear" (
  "tool_wear_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tool wear value */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment the tool wear value is for */,
  "tool_wear" INTEGER /* Tool wear value */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the tool wear value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tool_wear_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tool_wear_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id")
)
